meta.topic: How we got a Noida founder from idea to incorporated + GST + live website in 17 working days
meta.audience: First-time founders and early-stage startups needing legal + tech + marketing

slides.headline: Pvt Ltd registered. GST filed. Landing page live. 17 working days.
slides.subhead: Here's the exact timeline for a Noida founder we worked with in early 2026.
From first call to a fully operational business entity with GST number, CoI, and a live web presence. Same team the whole way.

left.label: Week 1 (Days 1–5)
left.body:
Day 1: discovery call + document checklist sent
Days 2–3: DSC + DIN initiated, name search (MCA + IP India)
Day 4: name reservation filed (SPICe+ Part A)
Day 5: MOA/AOA drafted and reviewed with founder

right.label: Weeks 2–3 (Days 6–17)
right.body:
Days 6–10: SPICe+ Part B filed, MCA approval received
Day 11: GST registration application submitted
Days 12–14: Brand identity + copywriting
Days 15–17: Landing page built, tested, and live
Day 17: GST certificate received

slides.headline: What we handed over on day 17

left.label: Legal & compliance
left.body:
Certificate of Incorporation
PAN card (business)
TAN
GST registration certificate
First nil-return filed and confirmed

right.label: Brand & marketing
right.body:
Brand kit (colours, fonts, logo)
Landing page (live, mobile-optimised)
LinkedIn company page set up
30-day content calendar

slides.headline: I was expecting to chase 4 different vendors for 6 weeks. I came out with everything in 17 days.
What does your timeline look like?
slides.body: Book a 20-min call — we'll walk your specific case and give you a real timeline and quote. No generics.

caption:
Pvt Ltd registered. GST filed. Landing page live.

17 working days.

Here's the exact timeline.

A Noida-based founder came to us in early 2026. Needed to get a Pvt Ltd off the ground, get GST sorted, and have something live on the internet to show early clients.

Week 1:
→ Day 1: Discovery call, document checklist shared
→ Days 2–3: DSC + DIN initiated, MCA + IP India name search
→ Day 4: Name reservation filed
→ Day 5: MOA/AOA drafted and signed off

Weeks 2–3:
→ Days 6–10: SPICe+ filed, Certificate of Incorporation received
→ Day 11: GST application submitted
→ Days 12–14: Brand identity + landing page copy
→ Days 15–17: Landing page built, live, and mobile-tested
→ Day 17: GST certificate received

What we handed over:
 Legal: CoI, PAN, TAN, GST certificate, first nil-return filed
 Brand: logo, brand kit, landing page, LinkedIn page, 30-day content plan

"I was expecting to chase 4 different vendors for 6 weeks. I came out with everything in 17 days."
— Founder, Noida (name withheld on request)

One team. One timeline. One number to call.

Book a 20-min slot and I'll build the same map for your situation.

#IndiaStartup #PvtLtd #Noida #Founder #StartupIndia #BusinessSetup #Compliance
